title: Dataset for "Open Educational Resources for distributed hands-on teaching in molecular biology"
author: Federici, Fernan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the raw data for an article that describes novel OER consisting of low cost and locally produced public domain biological reagents, open source hardware and free software collaborative notebooks to teach LAMP DNA amplification, RT-PCR RNA detection, enzyme kinetics and fluorescence imaging.
steps_raw: This is the raw data for an article that describes novel OER consisting of low cost and locally produced public domain biological reagents, open source hardware and free software collaborative notebooks to teach LAMP DNA amplification, RT-PCR RNA detection, enzyme kinetics and fluorescence imaging.
